name: REST Source
description: HTTP GET/POST against a REST connector baseUrl + path; emit JSON payload and records.

name: Webhook Source
description: Ingress webhook events via provisioned connector URL.

name: JSON Transform
description: Map and reshape JSON records between stages.

name: Python Filter
description: Filter records with a safe Python expression over each record (e.g. quantity > 0 and category in ('food','toys')). Bind connector/service as needed; set deployment.region and execution.expression on the step.

expression.description: Filter expression; leave blank to use built-in inventory rules in the local image

name: ADLS Destination
description: Write batches to Azure Data Lake Storage.

name: S3 Source
description: Ingest a single object from an S3-compatible bucket. Set deployment.region and execution.objectKey on the pipeline step; bind a storage connector (bucket) and optional auth service for credentials.

name: GCS Source
description: Ingest objects from Google Cloud Storage.

name: JDBC Source
description: Query relational databases into the pipeline.

name: MongoDB Source
description: Change-stream or collection scan from MongoDB.

name: Salesforce Source
description: Pull CRM objects via Salesforce APIs.

name: File Watch Source
description: Watch local or mounted paths for new files.

name: FTP Source
description: Poll FTP/SFTP directories for inbound files.

name: CSV Source
description: Fetch a delimited file from object storage and emit parsed JSON records.

name: Parquet Source
description: Read Parquet batches from object storage.

name: IoT Hub Source
description: Ingest device telemetry from IoT Hub.

name: CDC Source
description: Capture change data from transactional DBs.

name: Schedule Source
description: Emit timer ticks on a cron schedule. Set execution.cron (e.g. */15 * * * *) to fire every 15 minutes; the platform also honors pipeline execution_config.scheduleCron.

name: Manual Source
description: Accept ad-hoc JSON payloads when you click Run (or POST /run).

name: Field Mapper
description: Rename/project record fields via execution.mapping. Modes: map (records only) or upsert/replace (wrap as {mode, items}). Set deployment.region and execution.mode on the step.

mode.description: upsert | replace for Petstore bulk upload

name: Schema Validator
description: Validate records against a JSON schema.

name: Joiner
description: Join two streams on a key.

name: Splitter
description: Split array fields into multiple records.

name: Enricher
description: Lookup and enrich records from a service.

name: Masker
description: Mask PII fields before downstream stages.

name: Branch Router
description: Route records by expression to branches.

name: CSV to JSON
description: Convert CSV text (message.csv / content) into JSON records. Set deployment.region and execution.delimiter on the step.

name: Geo Enrich
description: Add geo metadata from IP or address.

name: Sample Filter
description: Keep a percentage sample of records.

name: Null Drop
description: Drop records with null required fields.

name: Type Coercer
description: Coerce field types to a target schema.

name: ML Scorer
description: Score records with a registered model.

name: HTML Strip
description: Strip HTML tags from text fields.

name: GCS Destination
description: Write objects to Google Cloud Storage.

name: Azure Blob Destination
description: Write blobs to Azure Blob Storage.

name: Webhook Destination
description: POST JSON to connector baseUrl + execution.path. Bind a REST connector; set deployment.region and execution.path on the step.

name: Redis Destination
description: Write keys or streams to Redis.

name: File Destination
description: Write files to a mounted path.
